item.title: ZmTCRR-1
item.description: Gene Details: Gene ID: Gene Symbol: ZmTCRR-1 Gene Name: transfer cell response regulator-1 Genome: Species: Zea mays Functional Descriptions: The maize transfer cell-specific type-A response regulator ZmTCRR-1 appears to be involved in intercellular signalling.
